channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Absolum coming to Switch 2
item.content:encoded:
Physical edition includes full game on card.

Publisher Dotemu and developers Guard Crush Games and Supamonks will release arcade-like beat ’em up game Absolum for Switch 2, the companies announced. A release date was not anounced.

Absolum first launched for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam on October 9, 2025, followed by Xbox Series on March 25, 2026.

Silver Lining Interactive, which has already released PlayStation 5 and Switch physical editions, will also release a Switch 2 physical edition with the full game on the game card in Q3 2026. Pre-orders are open now via Silver Lining Direct for $49.99 / £44.99 / €49.99.

Here is an overview of the game, via Dotemu:

Magic has been banned, but the resistance rises on Xbox! Defy Sun King Azra and his ruthless Crimson Order. Master the arts of combat, unlock powerful magical abilities, and team up with friends in co-op to restore magic to the world of Talamh.

Absolum blends arcade-like melee combat with spells, counters, and upgradable abilities. Choose from four uniquely powerful fighters and embark on a grand, high-stakes quest across beautifully hand-crafted stages.

With its fast-paced beat ’em up action and endless roguelite replayability, Absolum challenges you with multiple paths to explore and unpredictable encounters for a new experience each time you play.

Watch a new trailer below.

Switch 2 Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/absolum-coming-to-switch-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
